claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T012_S011_PRE_01 ("I think you you referred to pixels having depth. So that if one object moved ...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T011_S041_BLO_01 ("The fact that we can't model all the, all the possible dependencies between v...").
first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The predicted future state contains a mechanism that removes the named blocker; the prediction is therefore a market signal for the resolution mechanism.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker frames the prediction (snippet S011) and the blocker (snippet S041) as independent statements; the resolution link is asserted by the analogy engine.
why_potentially_useful: Predictions that resolve known blockers are higher-value than predictions that simply extrapolate trends — they imply an unaddressed market need.
